feed.subtitle: QLD Severe Weather Alerts updated regularly
feed.title: QLD Severe Weather Alert Feed

entry.content: TEST WARNING 2. This is a brand new warning added to verify that Power Automate detects newly published feed entries.
entry.title: EMERGENCY WARNING - Brisbane CBD - SEVERE STORM - Issued at 12:20pm, Saturday 27 June 2026

entry.content: POWER AUTOMATE TEST ITEM. This is a new test warning created to confirm that the RSS/Atom trigger detects a newly published feed entry.
entry.title: TEST NOW - Power Automate Trigger Test - CYCLONE - Issued at 12:00pm, Saturday 27 June 2026
